abstract.text: Create beautiful static and dynamic websites using Swift.

inlineContent.text: WebUI is a Swift library for creating websites with a declarative, component-based approach. It allows you to write HTML using Swift’s type-safe syntax, with built-in support for styling, accessibility, and optimization. You can use WebUI for both static site generation and dynamic server-rendered content.
The library is built on a modular architecture that organizes functionality into focused components, making it easy to use only what you need and to extend the library in a consistent way.
Apply styling using a Tailwind CSS-inspired API
Generate static sites with optimized markup
Add Markdown content with front matter support
